ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "smartphone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smartphone sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of smartphones sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the smartphone was sold */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied during the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "smartphone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the smartphone being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful by other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the store is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

Price at which the smartphone was sold
ID of the customer who made the purchase
Payment method used for the sale
ID of the smartphone being reviewed
